_doc: Manual overrides for the Plex filled/outline classification.
can't reliably distinguish small solid shapes (Stop, CaretDown,
Rewind) from outline glyphs because Plex draws everything with
fill=currentColor and no strokes. Use this file to PROMOTE
missed visually-filled icons into the Filled tab and DEMOTE
How to add an icon: just append its PascalCase name to `include`
